idea_mining_patterns_cited: Pattern 3 — Impact score badge (existing via rankedScore)
Pattern 5 — List/Card view toggle (filter state lifted; toggle UI deferred)
Pattern 9 — Filter panel Primary+More filters (server-side category filter wired)

useSignalImage_ts.detail: hashId(id) % pool.length picks from 2-3 image pool per signal_type. Same signal = same image (stable). Different signals of same type = different images (variety). 19 SignalType values covered.

useIntelligence_ts.detail: Added signalTypes?: SignalType[] to UseIntelligenceOptions. .in('signal_type', signalTypes) applied to Supabase query when provided. queryKey updated to include signalTypes for cache isolation.

IntelligenceFeedSection_tsx.change: Lift filter state to props + export FEED_FILTERS
IntelligenceFeedSection_tsx.detail: FEED_FILTERS exported. Internal useState for activeFilter removed. Props: activeFilter + onFilterChange. filteredSignals memo now search-only (server handles type filter).

Intelligence_tsx.detail: activeFilter state at page level. activeSignalTypes useMemo derives SignalType[] from filter key. useIntelligence receives signalTypes + vertical. IntelligenceFeedSection receives activeFilter/onFilterChange. spotlightTrends slice 0,3 → 0,5.

live_demo_detector.detail: No fake-live violations introduced. isLive guard unchanged. PREVIEW banner remains on IntelligenceFeedSection when !isLive.

design_lock_enforcer.detail: 0 pro-* token usage, 0 font-serif, 0 hardcoded hex in changed files.
design_lock_enforcer.evidence: grep pro-*|font-serif|#1E252B src/pages/public/Intelligence.tsx src/components/intelligence/IntelligenceFeedSection.tsx → 0 violations (comment-only hit excluded)
